Video.summary: When Reno witnesses the cold-blooded murder of one of his trusted street pals, Reno himself becomes the victim of a brutal beating at the hands of the killers.
Video.title: Payback

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must protect a sleazy criminal who has been given immunity for fingering a top criminal.
Video.title: High Bleacher Man

Video.summary: For Reno Raines, taking refuge in a small-town saloon becomes hazerdous.
Video.title: Eye Of The Storm

Video.summary: News reports of Lt. Enrique Vilas' escape from El Salvador are accompanied by offers of a $100,000 reward for his capture.
Video.title: La Mala Sombra

Video.summary: A motorcycle cop is killed by a man on a "nighthawk." The killer motivated by a dispute over a game at a bar.
Video.title: The Shooter

Video.summary: After a dispute over a repair bill, a young motorcycle mechanic is murdered in cold blood by a maniacal cutthroat.
Video.title: Mother Courage

Video.summary: A bounty hunter tracking two bank robbers crosses paths with Hunter and McCall.
Video.title: Dead Or Alive

Video.summary: A drug dealer is killed by a thief who stole Hunter's "backup" gun. McCall must clear Hunter's name.
Video.title: Pen Pals

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall help a girl who claims her uncle has died and all of his pigeons have been stolen.
Video.title: Flight On A Dead Pigeon

Video.summary: Reno's vacation in Las Vegas is derailed when Bobby enlists him to track down a bail jumper.
Video.title: Second Chance

Video.summary: The death of a wealthy Palm Beach socialite leads Rita and Chris to a devious blackmail/extortion plot.
Video.title: S.O.B.

Video.summary: Rita's investigates the murder of a wealthy stockbroker.
Video.title: In The Name Of Love

Video.summary: A serial sex killer with a penchant for the personals forces Rita to put herself on the line.
Video.title: Dirty Laundry

Video.summary: A naked body of a well-known congressman washes up near his beach front compound.
Video.title: Men Seeking Women

Video.summary: The murder of a despised tabloid newspaper publisher provides Chns and Rita with a wide array of suspects.
Video.title: Hardcopy

Video.summary: A high school girlfriend of Chris' becomes a suspect in the murder of an aging actress.
Video.title: Curtain Call

Video.summary: Chris is suspended for shooting an unarmed thief as the victim’s mother plots unexpected revenge.
Video.title: Domestic Agenda

Video.summary: Rita takes in a homeless young girl who has witnessed a brutal murder.
Video.title: Lady Luck

Video.summary: Rita and Chris defend Rita’s friend accused of killing her nanny amid her husband’s secret affair.
Video.title: The Sock Drawer

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover to trap a killer who runs a string of illegal gambling casinos.
Video.title: Internal Affairs

Video.summary: Chris becomes involved with a college prostitute as he and Rita attempt to solve the death of another.
Video.title: Working Girl

Video.summary: Hutch goes undercover as a drug dealer to help Chris and Rita solve the murder of a young bystander.
Video.title: Powder Burn

Video.summary: Reno suspects that Bobby's new girlfriend has a deadly secret.
Video.title: Most Wanted

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby trail a beautiful escaped convict, but the real criminal mastermind is someone they would never suspect.
Video.title: Liar's Poker

Video.summary: In the moment before Reno apprehends a murderer,a helmeted motorcycle rider breaks up the party with a pistol.
Video.title: The Talisman

Video.summary: The pipe-bomb murder of Reno's ex-partner Jack Varnell sends Reno and Bobby south of the border in search of the cop-killer.
Video.title: Partners

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover as film execs when a local movie crew becomes the target of militants.
Video.title: Baser Instincts
